scenario.title: The Code Refactorer
scenario.context: You have working but messy code. You need AI to refactor it while maintaining functionality, improving structure, and following best practices.
scenario.goal: Write a prompt that guides AI to refactor existing code with clear improvement goals while preserving behavior.
constraints: Add tests to verify behavior preservation
scenario.exampleInput: Refactor this 200-line React component into smaller components with custom hooks. Currently: all state in one component, mixed concerns, no reuse. Goals: extract logic to hooks, split into 3-4 components, add TypeScript types.

rubric.name: Original Code
rubric.description: Is the code to refactor provided?

scoringGuide.excellent: Full code with problem areas annotated
Test requirements and API contracts defined
